definition: A governed digital proxy that acts as a personal fiduciary agent. Intelligence suggests, governance approves, execution performs. The human is the absolute root authority. No action reaches the outside world without explicit cryptographic approval and a tamper-evident receipt.

architecture.intelligence_layer: Swappable LLMs (Gemini, GPT, Claude, Perplexity) — the brains that think and propose
architecture.governance_layer: RIO Gateway — policy evaluation, cryptographic approval, fail-closed execution, hash-chained ledger
architecture.execution_layer: Connectors (Gmail, Google Drive, Web Search) — the hands that act, only after Gate approval
architecture.state_layer: IndexedDB on-device + cloud ledger sync — the memory that persists
architecture.witness_layer: Mutual awareness system that records all actions, proposals, and system performance for all parties

core_invariants: The Gate cannot be bypassed, even if the system believes it knows better
Every action, observation, proposal, or change produces a cryptographic receipt
current_phase: Phase 2 — Activating the Hands (real tool execution through governance gate)
simulator_slot: Defined in architecture, not built. Reserved for future quantum/advanced compute integration.
